ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the contributor is affiliated with */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Twitter username of the contributor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location(s) the contributor is based in */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username for linking to contributions */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL of the contributor's avatar */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the contributor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contributor is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contributor account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contributor account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contribution was made to */,
  "contribution_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution type */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contribution */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the contribution (e.g., link to the commit or issue) */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contribution is considered a major contribution */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the impact of the contribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contribution_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_type_id") REFERENCES contribution_types ("contribution_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the project's repository */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_types" (
  "contribution_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution type */,
  "contribution_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution type (e.g., code commit, issue resolution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contribution type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contribution type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contribution type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who has the affiliation */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the contributor is affiliated with */,
  "affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date the affiliation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the affiliation ended (if applicable) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor within the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the affiliation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the affiliation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_affiliations_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who owns the social media profile */,
  "twitter_username" TEXT /* Twitter username of the contributor */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile of the contributor */,
  "facebook_username" TEXT /* Facebook username of the contributor */,
  "instagram_username" TEXT /* Instagram username of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the social media profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the social media profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_social_media_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contribution_levels" (
  "contribution_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution level */,
  "contribution_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the contribution level (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contribution level is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contribution level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contribution level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributor_levels" (
  "contributor_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor level */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who has the level */,
  "contribution_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contribution level the contributor has */,
  "level_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor achieved the level */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the level is the current level of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contributor level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the contributor level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_levels_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributor_levels_contribution_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("contribution_level_id") REFERENCES contribution_levels ("contribution_level_id")
)
